game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **ガンファイアリボーン - Gunfire Reborn:** Players control one of several distinct heroes in a roguelite FPS, navigating procedurally generated levels using a left virtual joystick for movement and a right-side touch area for aiming and firing, with dedicated buttons for active skills (e.g., 15-30 second cooldown) and weapon swapping. Each run involves clearing rooms of various enemy types and elite encounters across multiple acts, with the primary objective being to defeat a powerful boss at the end of each act to progress to the next. Upon defeating enemies, players collect gold and randomly dropped weapons (e.g., pistols, rifles, elemental weapons, each with unique damage, fire rate, and magazine size) and "scrolls" that provide temporary buffs or debuffs for the current run. Progression within a run involves leveling up to choose "ascensions" that enhance hero abilities or weapon proficiencies, while meta-progression across runs is achieved by earning currency to unlock permanent talents in a persistent skill tree, making subsequent runs more powerful. The game supports single-player or up to four-player cooperative play, where team synergy and coordinated use of hero abilities are crucial for overcoming challenges. The run ends when the player's health reaches zero, requiring a restart from the beginning, with difficulty scaling through increased enemy density, stronger enemy variants, and more complex boss mechanics across later acts.
game_info.description: Roguelite FPS adventure where you battle through procedurally generated rooms filled with enemies. Collect weapons, scrolls, and gold to power up your hero. Defeat elite enemies and bosses to progress through acts. Each death means starting over, but permanent upgrades make you stronger for the next run. Clear all rooms and defeat the final boss to win!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your hero (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Space: Fire weapon / Confirm selection
Shift: Use active skill (cooldown-based)
Z: Swap weapon
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement and shooting mechanics. Validates that the player can move in all directions and fire weapons at enemies. Ensures collision detection works properly and the player can navigate through rooms.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player around the room systematically, exploring all areas. Fire weapons when enemies are detected within range. Collect any items encountered. Move to exit when room is cleared.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves through multiple rooms, destroys enemies, collects items, and demonstrates functional core mechanics without getting stuck or encountering errors.
TEST_1.description: Tests basic movement and shooting mechanics. Validates that the player can move in all directions and fire weapons at enemies. Ensures collision detection works properly and the player can navigate through rooms.
TEST_1.strategy: Move the player around the room systematically, exploring all areas. Fire weapons when enemies are detected within range. Collect any items encountered. Move to exit when room is cleared.
TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves through multiple rooms, destroys enemies, collects items, and demonstrates functional core mechanics without getting stuck or encountering errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the complete win condition by playing optimally through all acts. Validates that the player can defeat all enemies, bosses, and reach the final victory screen. Tests weapon swapping, skill usage, and combat strategy.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize survival by maintaining distance from enemies. Use active skills strategically against groups and elites. Swap to better weapons when found. Focus fire on nearest threats. Collect all scrolls and upgrades. Clear each room methodically before progressing.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully complete all acts by defeating all bosses. Reach GAME_OVER_WIN state. Validate that the win condition triggers properly and displays the victory screen with final stats.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests skill cooldown mechanics and weapon swapping under combat conditions. Validates that skills have proper cooldowns and weapon switching works correctly during active gameplay.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Alternate between weapons frequently during combat. Use active skill whenever off cooldown. Test responsiveness of weapon swapping and skill activation. Engage multiple enemies to stress test the systems.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Skills activate on correct cooldown intervals. Weapon swapping is instant and responsive. No bugs or delays in ability usage. Combat remains fluid throughout testing.
TEST_3.description: Tests skill cooldown mechanics and weapon swapping under combat conditions. Validates that skills have proper cooldowns and weapon switching works correctly during active gameplay.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests enemy AI behavior and spawn patterns. Validates that enemies track and attack the player appropriately, and that different enemy types exhibit distinct behaviors.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Observe enemy movement patterns by positioning player in different locations. Test enemy aggro range by approaching and retreating. Verify elite enemies and bosses use special abilities. Check enemy spawn rates across different rooms.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Enemies exhibit intelligent tracking behavior. Different enemy types show unique attack patterns. Elite and boss enemies demonstrate increased difficulty. Spawn rates scale appropriately with progression.
